title: Franky Is Targeted
description: Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Rob Lucci, Kaku. Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: How!? Kaku and Lucchi are over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's no end to them over here.

summary: Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.
